comment: Values must mirror ModelPins.h. Update both in same commit. Resolved 2026-04-21 from upstream release metadata (python-build-standalone/latest-release.json, huggingface.co/api/models/google/gemma-3-4b-it-qat-q4_0-gguf, api.github.com/repos/ggml-org/llama.cpp/releases/latest).
gemma_model_note: Gemma GGUF (filename gemma-3-4b-it-qat-q4_0.gguf per repo naming; actual HF filename is gemma-3-4b-it-q4_0.gguf) is NOT a prebuild artefact — downloaded at runtime to <ProjectDir>/Saved/NYRA/models/ per D-17. See ModelPins::GemmaGgufUrl (pinned to revision 15f73f5eee9c28f53afefef5723e29680c2fc78a, SHA256 76aed0a8285b83102f18b5d60e53c70d09eb4e9917a20ce8956bd546452b56e2). Repo is GATED — user must accept Gemma license on HF + supply an access token; Plan 09 surfaces this as -32005 gemma_not_installed with remediation.
